characters.name: Sung Jin-woo
characters.description: The protagonist who gains the ability to level up like a video game player. He transforms from the weakest hunter to the strongest being in existence.

characters.name: Cha Hae-in
characters.description: The Vice-Guildmaster of the Hunters Guild. She is incredibly fast and has a unique ability to smell mana, which is how she first notices Jin-woo's power.

characters.name: Choi Jong-in
characters.description: Known as the 'Ultimate Soldier' and leader of the Hunters Guild. He specializes in massive area-of-effect fire magic.

characters.name: Baek Yoon-ho
characters.description: The Guildmaster of White Tiger. He has the ability to transform into a beast-like humanoid, significantly boosting his physical strength and senses.

characters.name: Igris
characters.description: A loyal shadow soldier who was once the Red-Knight Commander. He is known for his stoic personality and exceptional swordsmanship.

characters.name: Yoo Jin-ho
characters.description: Jin-woo's loyal friend and the heir to a wealthy corporation. While not powerful, he provides essential logistical and financial support.
